name: Fresh one
description: A recently-turned dead, still quick on its feet. No tougher than a walker to put down — but it answers every blow, so a melee fight costs you more.
notes: T46 · mirrors the engine ENEMIES table (combat.ts). Same hp as a walker; initiative:true means it retaliates on every melee exchange (not the walker coin-flip), so trading blows is dangerous — a shot or a slip is safer. Keyed to zombie.fresh (swift arousal).
